title: NCL Aqua 2nd Annual Baby Boomers Thanksgiving — hosted group cruise flyer
author: Maulsby Travel Co.
description: Promotional flyer for the NCL Aqua 2nd Annual Baby Boomers Hosted Thanksgiving Group Cruise, Port Canaveral, Nov 21-28, 2027 (Great Stirrup Cay, Jamaica, Grand Cayman, Cozumel). Pulled from the Maulsby hosted-group-cruises page at operator request; voyage-companion cover.

visual_verification.note: Flyer: NCL Aqua · 7 nights · Nov 21-28 2027 · from Port Canaveral · Great Stirrup Cay, Jamaica, Grand Cayman, Cozumel · Solo Studio $1869 / OV $2729 / Balcony $3439 · includes $25 OBC + $50 shore-excursion credit per port + 150 min WiFi · Maulsby Travel
